sourceRef: tip:The first mistake new VASCOs usually make

slides.headline: Unlock Certifications
slides.body: Automate, track, and support student veterans with VASCO Assistant Pro.

slides.headline: Start Slow
slides.body: Begin with one or two certifications at a time to ensure accuracy.
bullets: Focus on getting it right the first time

slides.headline: Review Policies
slides.body: Stay updated on VA policies and regulations to avoid compliance issues.
bullets: Refer to the VA Education Handbook
Utilize resources like the Yellow Ribbon Program

slides.headline: Use Tools
slides.body: Leverage VASCO Assistant Pro to streamline certification processes.

slides.headline: Train Staff
slides.body: Educate your staff on the new system to ensure smooth transitions.
bullets: Assign a point person for support

slides.headline: Monitor Progress
slides.body: Regularly check on certifications to ensure all students are compliant.
bullets: Keep a close eye on student records

slides.body: Learn more about VASCO Assistant Pro and sign up for the waitlist. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Automate, track, and support student veterans with VASCO Assistant Pro. Start slow on the first ten certifications, focus on accuracy, and avoid compliance issues. Get ahead with these five essential steps. Learn more and sign up for the waitlist.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Train Staff' as it could benefit from a more specific takeaway.
